Hey, what's up everyone? Okay, so what happens when someone actually picks the phone up, right? Like this is fine. Like we've done all this call volume. What do we say when they say hello, right? So first thing you're gonna say is you're just gonna say their name and you're gonna say excitedly You'll be like Sarah and she's and then she's gonna be like so you never ask like is this Sarah I'm looking for so-and-so because then they already know that you don't know who you're talking to right and who? Who really has someone else pick up their cell phone? That's like antiquated from back in the days when there were home phones when like 10 people could pick up the phone Doesn't work like that anymore. Everyone has their own line and so it's stupid to say that and for some reason telemarketing companies still do it So don't do that. Just say Sarah and she's gonna say Yeah Who's this right because she's not gonna jump on you because you might be someone that actually knows her right? I mean like this is Alex and act like she should know who you are I'd be like this is Alex and she's gonna be like Like it's almost like she had some date two nights ago that she got too drunk and doesn't remember but like you get my point That's kind of the tone. It's like I can't like she's like racking her brain or not Alex from right this is Alex and as you pause like this is Alex From one two three fitness in Orange County I'm just going because you signed up for our free six we challenge on Facebook, right? So these are the key things that you're really trying to hit here local area Okay, fitness usually I mean and if you don't have fitness in your title you should as a side note For gyms, but anyways, you know, I'm calling from what you through fitness in Orange County because now you're local and you're familiar I'm calling because you're starting up for a free six you challenge at my GM on Facebook Facebook is like the big and they're like, oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, and we had two spots open up off the sold-out list So I'm calling to see what time you can come in tonight. All right. I'm here till eight I'm here till eight. Okay to Okay Whatever. All right. Now the goal is obviously always going to be same day next day because after same day next day the show It's dropped dramatically. Okay. Now. Um, when you're gonna go through this sequence One of the main points is going to be scarcity. Okay now I wasn't gonna include it in this list, but I think it actually makes a lot of sense for me to bring it up Scarcity is how people come in scarcity and urgency. That's what makes people act. Okay, so scarcity is there's only a couple Spots urgency is it ends in five minutes? Right? That's the difference between scarcity and urgency. All right, and you want to have both in the offer I'm gonna tell you a small story and it'll illustrate the point. So Kristen Robin Barnett Well Robin Rose Chris Barnett. Anyways, Kristen Robin. They're married. They own a gym in Idaho We were doing a launch with them and Sean Carlson and Kristen Robin were running the sales side. Okay. Now. They already know this stuff. They're pretty there They do great. They did their first launch with me. They did 120 sales like they're they're good sales people They work the phones now what happened is the second launch when they were working with Sean It was a month-long launch because we're launching his gym. Okay, we ended up signing 170 plus people in 24 days Okay, now what happened is the first 20 or so days The show rate for some reason still with all of the tricks in our book was just about 50% Which it's I'm not like thrilled about that. That's like meh, you know, I mean, it's okay If that I think some days we had 45% 40% show rates, so they weren't happy about it I wasn't really thrilled about either. I was like, you're really hitting the scarce here. You're hitting the scarcity They're like, yeah, we're in the scarcity and so the last week and particularly the last three days before the actual end of the promotion because Kristen Robin had to go and work on their gym and do other stuff What do you think story was? It was over 70% now Why was it over 70% when the whole time? It was literally just words that were coming out of their mouth But those words were able to influence the perception of the prospects on the phone And what do you think they were saying for real this time? You have to make it in by Friday. Otherwise you can't get a spot What about Saturday? I'm sorry You got to come in and if you miss your appointment guys like if you miss your appointment tonight You won't be able to get a spot like it's gonna be closed. All right forever You won't be able to do this program and so what happened was when they started saying and this is why I tell you to do this Hey, if you miss your appointments tonight, you'll never be able to do the program. All right, like it's gonna close So make sure to be in okay, and why do I say that because if you just look at the math the likelihood that someone a Reschedules and then B has to do the same math of are they gonna show on their rescheduled appointment? Which is actually not higher but lower it's less likely So you have more work and then you get them rescheduled and then they're less likely to show that initial appointment Okay versus just trying to get them to all show on the first appointment. I've been thinking about it again Okay, so that scarcity is everything So you really truly need to believe in your guts that if that person does not show up You won't be able to help them and so you have to be like candid and honest with them when you're like listen If you don't show up for your appointment, you're not gonna be able to the program They're like wow like and you're afraid as a gym owner as a business owner I'm gonna miss out on the opportunity to sell them in the future But it's not true because most of our gonna come in because it wasn't important enough So we need to elevate the importance and get that I will come in another time out of their mind as an obstacle that they can do right at Five o'clock when they're thinking about going home versus going to the gym first. Okay, so this is huge now again rapport wins wars so Try and be friendly be upbeat have high tone good pitch be excited to be on the phone Because ultimately people can hear the tonality of the person they're talking to alright So if you have someone else doing the cause listen how they sound it's important Okay, and then the same thing with the scarcity for them is that you need to make sure they say listen If you won't make it tonight, you won't be able to do the program. Alright, so it's just really really important that when they said that appointment Even if it's tomorrow like hey, you miss your appointment. You're not gonna be able to do it. Alright, we're really just looking for serious people Okay That is the script. These are the main key points. These are the highlights that you're trying to make sure That you hit so that people Know what's going on
